Publications

Evidence that informs decisions

Our publications translate evidence into practical recommendations that support policy, program design, and implementation across Somalia and the region.

Reports

Research and analytical reports

Report

Somalia Labor Market Assessment 2024

2024

Comprehensive analysis of Somalia's labor market dynamics, employment trends, and workforce development opportunities.

Download PDF
Report

Institutional Capacity Review: Federal Ministry Governance

2024

Assessment of governance structures and institutional capacity within federal ministry systems.

Download PDF
Report

Livestock Sector Employment and Livelihood Analysis

2023

Analysis of employment generation and livelihood patterns within Somalia's livestock value chain.

Download PDF

Policy Briefs

Actionable policy recommendations

Policy Brief

Strengthening Social Protection Delivery in Somalia

2024

Recommendations for improving social protection targeting, delivery mechanisms, and beneficiary registration systems.

Download PDF
Policy Brief

TVET Reform and Youth Employment

2024

Strategic recommendations for aligning technical and vocational training with labor market demand.

Download PDF
Policy Brief

One Health Integration in Pastoral Communities

2023

Policy framework for integrating livestock health, human health, and environmental resilience in pastoral areas.

Download PDF

Insights

Analysis and commentary

Insight

Donor Compliance in Fragile Contexts

2024

Practical lessons from implementing donor compliance frameworks in Somalia's development programming.

Download PDF
Insight

Digital Service Delivery: Lessons from Implementation

2024

Reflections on deploying digital platforms for public service delivery in low-connectivity environments.

Download PDF
Insight

Adaptive Management in Practice

2023

How adaptive management approaches improve project outcomes in complex delivery environments.

Download PDF

Technical Papers

In-depth technical analysis

Technical Paper

Results Framework Design for Multi-Sector Programs

2024

Technical guidance on designing results frameworks that serve both accountability and learning objectives across sectors.

Download PDF
Technical Paper

MEL Systems for Livestock and Veterinary Programs

2023

Technical specifications for monitoring, evaluation, and learning systems tailored to livestock sector programs.

Download PDF
